title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Extracts the local buffer implementation from pkg/gitparse/gitparse.go into a shared package
1.2: Extracts buffer pool logic from pkg/writers/buffered_file_writer/bufferedfilewriter.go into a shared package
1.3: Creates buffer.go as a shared buffer pool package in pkg/writers/buffer/ containing the consolidated pool and buffer primitives
1.4: Updates pkg/gitparse/gitparse.go to use the shared content writer implementation (such as bufferwriter.New) instead of its local buffer type
1.5: Updates pkg/writers/buffered_file_writer/bufferedfilewriter.go to use the shared buffer pool implementation instead of its local bufferPool
1.6: Removes the buffer struct type definition from pkg/gitparse/gitparse.go
1.7: Removes the state type and its constants (state, writeOnly, readOnly) from pkg/gitparse/gitparse.go
1.8: Removes the newBuffer function from pkg/gitparse/gitparse.go

1.9: Removes all 9 buffer pool definitions (bufferPoolMetrics struct, recordGrowth, recordShrink, recordCheckoutDuration, recordBufferRetrival, recordBufferReturn, bufPoolOpt, bufferPool struct, defaultBufferSize) from pkg/writers/buffered_file_writer/bufferedfilewriter.go
1.10: Removes the newBufferPool function from pkg/writers/buffered_file_writer/bufferedfilewriter.go
1.11: Removes the bufferPool get method from pkg/writers/buffered_file_writer/bufferedfilewriter.go
1.12: Removes the bufferPool put method from pkg/writers/buffered_file_writer/bufferedfilewriter.go
1.13: Removes the bufferPool growBufferWithSize method from pkg/writers/buffered_file_writer/bufferedfilewriter.go
1.14: Adds context.Context as the first parameter to newDiff in pkg/gitparse/gitparse.go

1.15: Consolidates all 11 buffer pool Prometheus metrics (including active_buffer_count, buffer_count, total_buffer_length, total_buffer_size, grow_count, grow_amount, shrink_count, shrink_amount, checkout_duration_total_us, checkout_duration_us, ...) into the new shared buffer package
1.16: Prefixes the 2 remaining BufferedFileWriter metrics (total_write_size_bytes, total_write_duration_microseconds) to avoid naming conflicts with the new buffer writer package
1.17: Creates bufferwriter.go as a shared content writer package in pkg/writers/buffer_writer/
1.18: Adds context.Context as the first parameter to New in pkg/writers/buffered_file_writer/bufferedfilewriter.go
1.19: Removes the sync import from pkg/writers/buffered_file_writer/bufferedfilewriter.go
2: Documentation Maintainability
3: Artifact Cleanup
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Changes the contentWriter interface method signatures (Write, ReadCloser, CloseForWriting, Len, String) in pkg/gitparse/gitparse.go
4.2: Changes the BufferedFileWriter.New signature in pkg/writers/buffered_file_writer/bufferedfilewriter.go without updating the bufferedfilewriter.New() call in pkg/gitparse/gitparse.go
